texto: A lifetime spent in the study of the history of societies since the dawn of mankind presumably inclined him to skepticism and misgivings in regard to any great scheme, religious or political, that set out to create universal happiness in one fell swoop; what it was more likely to create, in his opinion, was universal misery; and his faith in heaven-sent saviors was hardly greater.
explicacao: Citação de François Maspero sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “A lifetime spent in the study of the history of societies since the dawn of mankind presumably in…” articula fe, cynical, politics em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como estudos e politics.

texto: The faces you clutch at desperately slip away; it's when you're not thinking about them that their features flash past. It can happen on a street corner, at the turn of a staircase, because somebody said a word, because some image, an image has passed. Then the face is there for a split second, very fragile. One mustn't grasp at it, or it whisks away. One might as well try and catch a cloud. It was a cloud.
explicacao: Orientação direta de François Maspero sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “The faces you clutch at desperately slip away; it's when you're not thinking about them that thei…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, memory, because, útil em momentos de reflexao.

texto: Being unhappy alone isn't all that much fun, but what's even tougher is playing one's part without forgetting one's lines, coping with other people's compassion, their comments, being there with the right line when they give the cue.
explicacao: Citação de François Maspero sobre temas ligados a felicidade. “Being unhappy alone isn't all that much fun, but what's even tougher is playing one's part withou…” articula felicidade, cynical, sadness em registro de felicidade, com relevância para contextos como sadness.
